articles.title: Iran-backed militia releases American journalist kidnapped in Iraq - Politico
articles.description: Shelly Kittleson, who has written for POLITICO and other outlets, was abducted last week.
articles.content:
The journalist, who was taken by the Iranian-aligned paramilitary group Kataib Hezbollah, was released on the condition that she leave the country immediately, according to The Associated Press.
